title: Botany Pots Depot
description: A compatibility mod between the Botany Pots mod and Dye Depot, adding 96 new pots in 16 new colors!
body:
# Botany Pots Depot
### Compatibility bewtween Botany Pots and Dye Depot

This small mod adds compatibility between Botany Pots and Dye Depot, allowing you to create Botany Pots with the 16 new colors in Dye Depot!

Make sure to have [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) and [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) installed to use these new colored pots!
